meaning: adj.不动摇的,不为所动的,不受影响的
examples: The organic community remains unswayed by either biology or history, however, and modern genetic engineering remains prohibited from organic agriculture.
But the generals and the no less secularist judiciary remain unswayed.
Even in the face of rising opposition from pilots, air marshals, flight attendants, 130 members of Congress, several airlines and many TSA screeners, Mr. Pistole is unswayed.
